responsibilities: • provide budgeting, forecasting, and cash flow management   • monitor burn rate, runway, and unit economics   • support fundraising, investor reporting, and board discussions   • implement mis, dashboards, and financial controls   • oversee accounting,  taxation, and compliance teams   • act as strategic finance partner to founders and ceos
qualifications: • ca with startup, sme, or corporate finance experience   • strong strategic thinking and communication skills
